title: CVQNN
description: Continuous Variable Quantum Neural Network (CVQNN) for binary classification using phase-space quantum operations on the make_moons dataset.

params.help: Number of variational layers in the CV quantum circuit.
params.name: layers
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 2，范围在1到8之间

params.help: Truncation dimension of the Fock space for CV simulation. Higher values improve accuracy but increase cost.
params.name: cutoff
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 6，范围在3到12之间

params.name: epochs
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 40，范围在1到200之间

params.help: Learning rate for the Adam optimizer. Typical range: 0.001–0.1.
params.name: lr
